A.A: How to Master a New Skill
Determine why you want to learn the skill and what you hope to achieve by doing so.
Acquire a solid foundation of the basics of the skill before moving on to more advanced techniques.
Dedicate time each day or each week to practicing the skill. Consistency is key to improvement.
